setback_rules.description: Minimum distance from plot boundary to building (varies by city)
setback_rules.note: Values in feet. These are typical for residential plots in Indian municipalities.

building_rules.description: FSI = Floor Space Index. Ground coverage = buildable footprint / plot area.

ventilation_rules.description: Rooms must have adequate natural light and ventilation

structural_rules.bathroom_plumbing_stack: Bathrooms should align vertically across floors
structural_rules.load_bearing_walls: External walls and key internal walls carry structural load

vastu_rules.description: Traditional Indian architectural guidelines for room placement
